failure.message: Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 80

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_vpc_security_group_ingress_rule.alb_http File: /security_groups.tf: 26-33 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-aws-security-groups-do-not-allow-ingress-from-00000-to-port-80
26 | resource "aws_vpc_security_group_ingress_rule" "alb_http" { 27 | security_group_id = aws_security_group.alb.id 28 | description = "HTTP desde internet (redirect 80->443 en ALB listener)" 29 | from_port = 80 30 | to_port = 80 31 | ip_protocol = "tcp" 32 | cidr_ipv4 = "0.0.0.0/0" 33 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_130] Ensure VPC subnets do not assign public IP by default

failure.message: Ensure VPC subnets do not assign public IP by default

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_subnet.public[0] File: /vpc.tf: 15-27 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-vpc-subnets-do-not-assign-public-ip-by-default
15 | resource "aws_subnet" "public" { 16 | count = length(var.availability_zones) 17 | 18 | vpc_id = aws_vpc.main.id 19 | cidr_block = var.public_subnet_cidrs[count.index] 20 | availability_zone = var.availability_zones[count.index] 21 | map_public_ip_on_launch = true 22 | 23 | tags = { 24 | Name = "${var.project}-${var.environment}-public-${var.availability_zones[count.index]}" 25 | Tier = "public" 26 | } 27 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_378] Ensure AWS Load Balancer doesn't use HTTP protocol

failure.message: Ensure AWS Load Balancer doesn't use HTTP protocol

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_lb_target_group.reservas File: /alb.tf: 70-97 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/bc-aws-378
70 | resource "aws_lb_target_group" "reservas" { 71 | name = "${var.project}-${var.environment}-tg-reservas" 72 | port = 3000 73 | protocol = "HTTP" 74 | vpc_id = aws_vpc.main.id 75 | target_type = "ip" 76 | 77 | health_check { 78 | enabled = true 79 | path = var.alb_health_check_path 80 | protocol = "HTTP" 81 | port = "traffic-port" 82 | healthy_threshold = 2 83 | unhealthy_threshold = 3 84 | timeout = 5 85 | interval = 30 86 | matcher = "200-299" 87 | } 88 | 89 | lifecycle { 90 | create_before_destroy = true 91 | } 92 | 93 | tags = { 94 | Name = "${var.project}-${var.environment}-tg-reservas" 95 | Service = "svc-reservas" 96 | } 97 | }

failure.message: Ensure AWS Load Balancer doesn't use HTTP protocol
